message:
test(history): add comprehensive history module integration tests

SUMMARY
=======
Adds two new test files providing thorough integration testing for the
command history system, covering database operations, writer behavior,
and data integrity.

NEW TEST FILES
==============

tests/history_full_flow.rs (54 lines):
- test_full_history_pipeline: End-to-end test of log→query→FTS pipeline
- Validates command entry insertion, retrieval, and full-text search indexing
- Confirms row IDs, stored values, and FTS synchronization

tests/history_integration.rs (612 lines, 20 tests):

Database Operations:
- test_full_history_pipeline: Complete log→query→FTS flow
- test_command_ordering: Verifies temporal ordering of entries
- test_large_dataset_insertion: Stress test with 1000+ entries
- test_fts_on_seeded_data: Full-text search accuracy on fixtures
- test_database_persistence: Reopen and verify data survives
- test_in_memory_operations: Ephemeral database functionality
- test_command_hash_stored: SHA-256 hash computation and storage
- test_vacuum_operation: Database maintenance operations

Query Operations:
- test_standard_mix_fixture: Complex fixture querying
- test_outcome_distribution_queries: Aggregate outcome statistics
- test_pack_analysis_queries: Pack effectiveness data retrieval
- test_working_dir_filtering: Project-based filtering
- test_agent_type_tracking: Agent distribution queries

HistoryWriter Tests:
- test_history_writer_logs_allow: Allowed command logging
- test_history_writer_respects_disabled: Config disable flag
- test_history_writer_full_redaction: Full command redaction mode
- test_history_writer_logs_deny_with_match_info: Denied command metadata
- test_history_writer_flushes_on_drop: Graceful shutdown behavior
- test_history_writer_async_performance: Async write latency bounds

Concurrency:
- test_concurrent_writes: Multi-threaded write safety

TEST INFRASTRUCTURE
===================
- Uses common::db::TestDb for isolated test databases
- Leverages common::fixtures for standardized test data
- All tests use init_test_logging() for debugging support

COVERAGE
========
These tests complement the unit tests in schema.rs by testing:
- Cross-module integration (config→writer→db)
- Real SQLite behavior (not mocked)
- Thread safety and concurrent access patterns
- Performance characteristics under load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
